programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When Walter finally learns Cabe's secret about the Baghdad mission, the future of the team is threatened; Ralph puts his life in jeopardy to help the team.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When Walter's car ends up at the edge of a cliff, the fractured team must come together for their most important mission yet.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When a nuclear-powered Russian satellite is knocked out of orbit, the new Director of Homeland Security reunites the team; Paige and Walter confront their feelings.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When a woman from Cabe's past asks for help apprehending a war criminal, the members of Team Scorpion travel to Cuba.

programme.title: Red 2

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: The memories and skills of a deceased CIA agent are implanted into a dangerous convict.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: An army pilot must travel through time using the 'Source Code' in order to identify a ruthless bomber.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: A group of retired secret agents reunite when they are targeted by mysterious assassins.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: 99 Homes [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A recently unemployed single father struggles to get back his foreclosed home by working for the real estate broker who is the source of his frustration.

programme.title: 10th & Wolf [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: While serving in the military, a Marine sergeant (James Marsden) believes his family's ties to organized crime are a thing of the past. However, an act of insubordination and a visit from the F.B.I. send him packing to his South Philadelphia hometown, and he discovers that his brother (Brad Renfro) and his cousin (Giovanni Ribisi) have become entangled with mobsters, leaving him with only one way to save them.

programme.title: Jack's Back [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: In a sickening coincidence -- or a sinister homage to actual crimes -- women are being murdered in Los Angeles 100 years after Jack the Ripper terrorized London. Police think John Westford, a young doctor, is the murderer, and when he's found hanging from a noose, authorities believe his apparent suicide is a tacit admission of guilt. But his twin brother, Rick (also Spader), insists John was killed, and, when it appears Rick is right, the investigation takes a stunning turn.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A former getaway driver jeopardizes his Witness Protection Plan.

programme.title: CA$H
programme.desc: In this crime thriller starring Sean Bean and Chris Hemsworth, a down-and-out couple finds a briefcase of money that solves all their problems — until a menacing stranger forces them to commit armed robberies to pay it all back.

programme.title: Marlowe
programme.desc: Bay City, down on his luck detective is hired to find the ex-lover of a glamorous heiress.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: In this carefully crafted suspense thriller, a group of problem students at an exclusive Northeastern prep school band together to wage a desperate and deadly campaign against terrorists who lay siege to their school in an effort to free a Colombian drug lord from an American prison.

programme.title: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: The day after he finds the body of a dead girl on his daily jog, a prominent lawyer is called into the police station to "tie up a few loose ends." [Edited For Television]

programme.title: Miracle On The Mountain: The Kincaid Family Story
programme.desc: A dysfunctional family must pull together to survive a plane crash in the wilderness.

programme.title: All The Pretty Horses
programme.desc: Two Texas cowboys head to Mexico in search of work, but soon find themselves in trouble with the law after one of them falls in love with a wealthy rancher's daughter.

programme.title: Under The Yum Yum Tree
programme.desc: A couple in love agree to determine their "character compatability" by living together platonically.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes To Town
programme.desc: A reluctant millionaire (Gary Cooper) is declared insane when he announces that he ll give his fortune away to America s poor. Oscar winning direction by Frank Capra.

programme.title: The Wackiest Ship In The Army
programme.desc: During WW II, Lt. Rip Crandall commands the USS Echo, a run-down ship with the archetypal inexperienced, motley crew, assigned to deliver an Australian observer to a Japanese-held island.

programme.title: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: IN COLD BLOOD dramatizes actual events and people in a realistic, technically well-crafted fashion, based upon Truman Capote s novel. The movie is a faithful docudrama about the real-life mass murder of the Clutter family, which took place in Holcomb, Kansas on November 15, 1959 by two psychopathic killers.

programme.title: Holy Motors
programme.desc: From dawn to dusk, a few hours in the shadowy life of a mystic man named Monsieur Oscar.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: The split-second moments that can take a life down one path instead of another form the tantalizing "what if?" in this delightful romantic comedy starring Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: The Kid
programme.desc: The Tramp cares for an abandoned child, but events put that relationship in jeopardy.

programme.title: Lazy Susan
programme.desc: Susan (Hayes) has always been the self-centered oddball in her family who lazily skated through life with their begrudging support until one day she wakes up to realize she's middle-aged with no job, no relationship, and an increasingly estranged family. She finally decides to take charge and turn things around, but never having done anything herself before, the struggle is real (and hilarious) as Susan becomes the woman she always wanted to be, all on her own.

programme.title: Agent Red
programme.desc: Captain Matt Hendricks and Dr. Linda Christian are locked in a submarine with Russian terrorists that threaten to launch a chemical virus on US territory.

programme.title: The Protege
programme.desc: A contract killer ventures out to avenge her mentor’s murder.

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: Anna Poliatova will unleash indelible strength and skill to become one of the world’s most feared assassins.

programme.title: Kite
programme.desc: With the help of a cop, an orphan blasts her way through the underworld in pursuit of her parents' killers.

programme.title: Dominique
programme.desc: A trained assassin flees her troubled past to begin a new life, but soon finds herself in a violent town.

programme.title: A Vigilante
programme.desc: After escaping her dangerous husband, a woman turns avenger to help victims of domestic abuse.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Prey of Wrath
programme.desc: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Evil
programme.desc: An assassin goes to Thailand in order to solve a kidnapping case and finds himself chased by a man whose sibling he killed.

programme.title: Raging Fire
programme.desc: Bong is a highly respected cop with a long history of success on dangerous cases. However, his past soon comes back to haunt him when his former protégé seeks revenge against all those who have wronged him.

programme.title: Sakra
programme.desc: Accused of murder, a martial artist goes on the run in search of answers about his own mysterious origins and the unknown enemies out to destroy him.

programme.title: Enter the Fat Dragon
programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mysterious death of a suspect who was in his custody during a routine transfer.

programme.title: To Kill a Stepfather
programme.desc: Nicole learns stepfather Matthew died, mother Kate arrested.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Casey Anthony's former jail mate reveals how the two forged a deep friendship.

programme.title: Daddy's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: For Richard and Ellie, everything changes when their daughter doesn't return home.

programme.title: Daddy's Perfect Little Girl
programme.desc: Ella, 12, faces change 2 years after mom's death as dad starts dating.

programme.title: To Kill a Stepfather
programme.desc: Nicole learns stepfather Matthew died, mother Kate arrested.

programme.title: The Secrets of Comfort House
programme.desc: A murder investigation in a small town focuses on Wendy Sinclair, who runs a shelter for the victims' wives.

programme.title: Dance Together
programme.desc: An injured dancer and a shy Deaf girl overcome bullies, disability stigma, and other high school obstacles.

programme.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programme.desc: When Emma is hired to bake for a royal cake, she finds herself at odds with a Prince.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: Breaking Free
programme.desc: When his wife is murdered in their own home, Joe, an undercover cop, spirals out of control with alcohol and substance abuse. When he’s seen by an old girlfriend on the street, she helps him to heal his spirit, along with finding justice for his wife.

programme.title: Born Again Baddie
programme.desc: Following a tragic car accident that claimed her mother’s life and left her father paralyzed, Nia is desperate and forced into a life of crime. After expanding her business and becoming the queen pin of the city, tragedy strikes and it forces her to find solace and reflection on her past life choices.

programme.title: The Undeserving
programme.desc: Harper, a cold-blooded assassin, botches a hit on the wrong target. Hunted by her employer, she's forced to confront her past trauma. Follow her descent into darkness as she tries to survive and escape the consequences of her actions.

programme.title: Against all Odds
programme.desc: David, a young man reeling from his brother's death and his family's financial ruin, finds himself adrift. Rejected by his father, he turns to a local criminal for quick cash, only to find himself trapped in a dangerous web of deceit and violence. Now, David must fight to escape and protect his family before it's too late. The clock is ticking, and the stakes are higher than ever.

programme.title: Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: 70 years after a UFO was spotted flying above Los Angeles, the alien invaders have returned.

programme.title: 100 Million BC
programme.desc: Time-traveling scientists inadvertently bring a giant carnivorous dinosaur back to modern Los Angeles.

programme.title: Age of Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Dinosaurs escape a biotech firm and terrorize Los Angeles. A father must rescue his daughter in the chaos.

programme.title: San Andreas Mega Quake
programme.desc: The "Big One" will sink California into the ocean, and scientists must stop by triggering a volcanic eruption.

programme.title: Geo-Disaster
programme.desc: A family must survive a volcano, earthquake, and tornado converging, forming an unprecedented cataclysm.

programme.title: VHS Massacre Too
programme.desc: Struggling to keep independent films alive, indie filmmakers travel from the last Blockbuster to Troma Studios, encountering threats like media consolidation and censorship that jeopardize indie cinema's survival from VHS to streaming.

programme.title: VHS Massacre
programme.desc: This lively documentary explores the rise and fall of physical media and its effect on Independent and cult films. Ranging from the origin of home movies through the video store era, it's sure to entertain. With icons like Joe Bob Briggs (MonsterVision), Lloyd Kaufman (Toxic Avenger), Greg Sestero (The Room), Debbie Rochon (Return to Nuke 'Em High), Deborah Reed (Troll 2), Mark Frazer (Samurai Cop), James Nguyen (Birdemic) and many others.

programme.title: The White Reindeer
programme.desc: The debut feature film by Finnish documentarian Erik Blomberg, this eerie and spectacularly filmed horror experience (Mondo Digital) remains a pioneering shocker of shamanism, vampirism and female sexuality: Unknowingly born a witch, a frustrated young Lapland wife (co-writer Mirjami Kuosmanen) shapeshifts into a bloodthirsty white reindeer with an insatiable appetite for the local herdsmen.

programme.title: Becoming Evil: Cult Of Personality
programme.desc: Why Serial Killers Kill - The Night Stalker and Jeffrey Dahmer. The reasons why these demonic serial murderers take the lives of innocent people are finally revealed in the final program.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: Streaming exclusively from Bloody Disgusting and Scotchworthy Productions, Bloody Bites is a compilation of snack-sized horror films that will terrorize, astonish, disturb, and excite genre fans across the globe.

programme.title: Another Cabin In The Woods Movie
programme.desc: A wedding party full of horror-savvy characters finds themselves trapped in yet another cabin in the woods. They must navigate a maze of murder and mystery to uncover who will stop at nothing for their twisted happily ever after.

programme.title: Bloodsucking Bastards (Edited Version)
programme.desc: When an office worker at a soul-crushing company loses a promotion to his longtime nemesis, he begins to fear for more than his job as strange disappearances and bizarre deaths suggest the office is turning into a haven for the undead.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Teens who go trick-or-treating are met with fear instead of smiles and sweets. Then, Justin brings home the wrong suitcase and is shocked to find a living man stuffed inside.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Harry stumbles upon an old scarecrow and brings it to life. Then, Lydia kills her lover and needs to hide the evidence, but after an earthquake she gets trapped inside an elevator with the body.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A killer gets stranded in a funeral home with a mortician and his monkey paw. Then, former Mayor Barkley is in prison, and with his most loyal supporters locked up too, his odds don't look good.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan discovers a cure to weight loss in a rare fat-sucking leech. Then, Rose believes she found Champ, the legendary monster of Lake Champlain, but the real monster may still be out there.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Jack's mother is taken from him, but her garden leaves more to remember her by than he first thought. Then, three teens meet their favorite pop star and realize she's not at all what they imagined.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A movie buff opens a prop museum, but a rival collector could put everything at risk. Then, Jackson is being followed by a dark force, but will his attempts to rid himself of it work?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: An art collector could never have anticipated the ways a terrifying painting would change his life. Then, life in prison is tough, but Elmer's pet spiders always have his back.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A siren lures a doctor into her trap to carry out a diabolical plan. Then, a teenage girl must fight off a demonic plague when she realizes her family might be infected.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Tim finds the answer to needing more hours in the day, but is it worth the cost? Then, when a small town opens a time capsule, the local librarian must try to keep history from repeating itself.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre
programme.desc: A look at what happened to Custer and his troops at the Battle of Little Big Horn.

programme.title: Brave Warrior
programme.desc: A federal government agent joins the legendary Chief Tecumseh in an effort to keep the British from inciting war between the Americans and the Shawnee.

programme.title: The Man From Laramie
programme.desc: A soldier's quest to avenge his brother's death pits him against an aging cattle baron and his psychotic son.

programme.title: Daring Danger
programme.desc: Tim McCoy is nearly killed in a fight with Alexander. He recovers and goes after the bad man, catching up to him and finding that he has taken up with a rustler. Of course, McCoy now has to go after the rustler, too. The film is based on a story by William Colt MacDonald.

programme.title: Streets Of Ghost Town
programme.desc: Starrett and Burnette, along with Andrews, are looking for one million in gold left in a ghost town. When not battling ghosts, they review in flashback the story of how the gold got there and how the gang stole it.

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos
programme.desc: Roy Rogers finds himself elected sheriff in a wild Texas town after the Civil War. But can Roy handle a place under martial law? And can he save Gabby Hayes from being executed? And how many songs will he get to sing? Clear the burrs from your saddle and get ready for a good one, also starring Marjorie Reynolds, plus Sally Payne as Belle Starr, Queen of the Oklahoma Outlaws!

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: After a condemned gunfighter (Steve Forrest) survives his own hanging, he helps a young widow stop a pitiless land baron from taking her ranch. This television feature boasts a strong cast of recognizable characters, including Will Geer, Sharon Acker, Dean Jagger, BarBara Luna, and Cameron Mitchell. Director Michael Caffey would go on to work on such hit shows as Barnaby Jones and MacGyver. Also, look for John Mitchum, younger brother of Robert, in a small role. This movie originally aired on ABC-TV and was considered the pilot for a possible series. Writer/producer Andrew Fenady was behind several opular TV shows such as Branded and The Rebel, as well as the 1970 John Wayne feature, Chisum.

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: Susan Hayward stars in this dramatic tale of the Oklahoma oil boom. She plays Cherokee Lansing, a determined young woman out to protect her father's honor after he's killed by men from a competing oil company. With a cast that includes Robert Preston, Ed Begley, and Pedro Armendariz, this engaging picture from producer Walter Wanger (Cleopatra, I Want to Live!) was nominated for an Academy Award in the Special Effects category. Also, listen for veteran character actor Chill Wills as the narrator!

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Roy Rogers's beloved horse Trigger is stolen and held for ransom money. Will Roy find $100,000 to get his faithful companion back, or will he find a way to trap the gang holding the horse hostage? Along with Roy and Trigger, you'll find Andy Devine as Cookie Bullfincher, and young Michael Chapin as Ted Carver, a gallant boy who helps reunite Roy with the smartest horse in show business!

programme.title: Cowboy And The Prizefighter
programme.desc: Red Ryder takes Steve Stevenson, who has saved his life, to his ranch and gives him a job. Red's aunt, the Duchess, knew Steve's father, who supposedly committed suicide after losing his ranch betting on a prizefight. Steve refuses to believe that his father took his own life, suspecting he was murdered. Red and Little Beaver aid Steve in finding his father killer.

programme.title: Hell Town
programme.desc: In Hell Town (aka Born to the West) John Wayne is back in the saddle as two-fisted Dare Rudd, a roaming cowhand trying to prove he can win a woman's love and outwit a crooked saloon owner. This exciting B-movie from Paramount Pictures was based on a novel by western writer Zane Grey. With a wild and wooly cast that includes Johnny Mack Brown, Marsha Hunt, Monte Blue, and Lucian Littlefield, director Charles Barton (Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein) gives us a tale of romance, action, and high stakes gambling!

programme.title: Buckskin
programme.desc: Set in 1820, a Texan fur trapper journeys into the mysterious Buckskin woods in the hopes of saving a lost boy.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Good for Nothing

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces "sweater weather" by making a savory Butternut Squash, Spinach, and Blue Cheese Pie. While he cooks, the hosts discuss expensive clothing habits and the woes of tight pants. A cooking question about pie layers hilariously derails into a conversation about dating terminology, and Michael reveals he is passing the Thanksgiving hosting torch to his son. The episode concludes with Michael giving away a lucky golf putter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Carla Hall is making a comforting Peach Cobbler Pound Cake mashup. While Carla bakes, Michael Symon annoys Clinton Kelly with a deafening hand mixer. The trio discusses their favorite childhood holiday cookies, passionately debates whether black-and-white cookies are actually good, and shares ideas for crazy food mashups. The episode ends with a giveaway of a custom-designed apron from Carla.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly dodges cooking duty by bringing in guest Chef Leah Cohen to tackle a fan's fridge. Leah whips up incredible Chicken Lettuce Wraps using ground chicken, hoisin, and leftover rice. The hosts talk Pop-A-Shot basketball, picky kids, and Michael gives away a very meaningful piece of his restaurant history.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes on the Fan Fridge challenge, cooking from Pat in Peoria's refrigerator. He prepares a beautiful Pan-Roasted Salmon with crispy skin, served alongside a bright Greek-inspired salad of avocado, cucumber, olives, feta, and red curry paste. The crew jokes about Nick's organizing skills and reads fan mail.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly leads this Chewed Up Bites episode by transforming leftover rotisserie chicken into a colorful, crunchy chicken salad inspired by the classic Chinese chicken salad popularized by Wolfgang Puck’s Chinois. As he assembles a simple sesame-lime vinaigrette and tosses together cabbage, carrots, bok choy, bell peppers, scallions, and shredded chicken, the hosts discuss the value of leftovers, pantry staples, and the difference between a salad and simply a bowl of lettuce. Michael Symon shares thoughts on menu development and simple comfort foods like peanut butter and jelly sandwiches. The conversation evolves into a broader discussion about healthy eating habits, meal planning, and the realization that not every meal needs to be an indulgent experience. Along the way, the hosts joke about Clinton’s “Gay Soup Diet,” debate the merits of themed ingredient weeks, and exchange playful banter about fashion makeovers, aging, and personal style. Sponsor shout-outs to FreshDirect and Frontgate are woven into the episode, highlighting convenient grocery delivery and entertaining essentials. A fan mail segment sparks more comedy, including the possibility of a future Gay Soup Diet cookbook. The episode wraps with the hosts sampling the finished salad, celebrating its fresh flavors and nutritional balance, before signing off with thanks to viewers and listeners.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Fan Fridge Week wraps up on Friday as Carla Hall transforms leftovers into a decadent Banana Bread French Toast. Using cottage cheese, oat milk, and eggs for a rich custard, she tops the sweet treat with a tart lemonade reduction, fresh berries, and chocolate syrup. The hosts discuss taking the show on the road in a van.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts celebrate their 25th show milestone with guest Chadwick Boyd, who elevates the classic Green Bean Casserole with caramelized onions, fresh beans, and a gruyere drop biscuit topping. While the casserole bakes, the crew debates mashed potato techniques, and Michael shares a hilarious story about how an AI misread his pan wall photo. A fan wins a Caraway pan set.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A Fan Fridge rescue mission unfolds when a hypothetical Thanksgiving goes wrong. Michael Symon saves the day using Tammy's fridge ingredients to create a savory skillet of chicken thighs, Italian sausage, and sweet peppers. Meanwhile, the hosts share their current TV binges, Michael explains the meanings behind his tattoos, and Clinton sings "Brandy" for a fan. The episode wraps with a giveaway of Carla's measuring bowls.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Danielle Sepsy of The Hungry Gnome joins the kitchen to bake her famous, plush Honey Corn Muffins. As the muffins bake, Clinton and Danielle test Carla and Michael's Long Island accents in a hilarious roleplay game. They also play Chew It or Screw It, share Thanksgiving food disaster stories, and give away a $75 gift card to Danielle's bakery to a fan in Virginia.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Kicking off Thanksgiving week, Clinton Kelly prepares a seasonal Delicata Squash Salad with goat cheese and pepitas. As the crew enjoys the autumn flavors, they discuss Thanksgiving versus Friendsgiving, dive into a comprehensive timeline for holiday prep, and give away a prize to a lucky fan from Oregon.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Marry-Me Chicken" - Chris whips up the infamous “Marry-Me Chicken,” one of the most searched for recipes of 2022 due to its alleged ability to coax a marriage proposal from a reluctant lover.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Redemption Rice" - After an ill-advised dalliance with a terrible chicken korma recipe, Chris tries to redeem the category of mixed-rice dishes, starting with the classic Japanese Takikomi Gohan.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Crispy Gnocchi with Burst Tomatoes" - Chris prepares one of the all-time most popular dishes from New York Times Cooking: Crispy Gnocchi with Burst Tomatoes. Tune in to see if the dish lives up to its poetic name.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Fluff Bread" - According to TikTok, egg whites + sugar + cornstarch + chocolate chips = cloud (a.k.a.) fluff bread. In this episode, Chris checks the math on this equation.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Salt-Broiled Fish" - After a visit to the studio from Liwei Liao (@dry_aged_fish_guy), Chris finds himself with a beautiful sea bream that’s begging to be prepared simply. Salt-roasting, it is.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Miso Black Cod" - Chris’s buddy David Chang recently showed us how not to cook miso black cod on the Dave Chang Cooking Show. Chris attempts to avenge his kitchen-mate by making this classic dish correctly.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie visits a busy office where stress has led to junk food snacking and fast-food lunching. Armed with photos of sugary office treats submitted by one office employee to solicit her help, Ellie shares tasty alternatives to fight back. Recipes include Herbed Farro Salad with Chicken, Walnuts, Feta and Spinach, Asian Chicken Wrap, and Buffalo Chicken Salad.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: There's a gluten-free explosion these days, but how much of it is real and how much of it is hype? Ellie demystifies the gluten issue once and for all with the help of her stepbrother and yoga instructor David Wilder, who has celiac disease. In this episode, Ellie also underscores just how many foods are naturally gluten-free, with recipes that will satisfy everyone. Recipes include Multigrain Pancakes, Steak au Poivre Salad, Roasted Salmon & Fennel with Lemon & Thyme, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Does sugar have you in its thrall? Ellie helps one family tackle their sugar quandary so they can continue to do the baking they love in a healthier way without sacrificing flavor. Recipes include Crispy French Toast Fingers with Blueberry Maple Sauce, Banana Bread with Chocolate Drizzle, Coconut Date Balls, and Cherry Chocolate Haystacks.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In Diane's adopted city of Athens, the food scene has everything to offer, from mouthwatering Souvlaki to Michelin-starred haute Greek. In this insider's taste of the Greek capital, the amazing flavors of a bustling modern "ancient" city bubble over in every pot. Experience Athens like never before, through its timeless and groundbreaking cuisine.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane goes off the beaten path to lush Mt. Pelion in Central Greece in search of ways to preserve nature's bounty. Preserves of every kind are the starting point for so many dishes here, from whole apples and almonds put up in sugar syrup to wild pistachio shoots pickled in vinegar. Discover the Greek tradition of sweet and savory preserves that pays homage to Greece's incredible produce.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits the source of the well-known Mediterranean Diet: Crete. For a glimpse of village life, she follows a local family's daily routine of working the land and cooking up a storm and meets an unusual farmer who lives the way people did on Crete a hundred years ago. Learn how to roll up a grape leaf as easy as one-two-three.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane follows the fillo flake trail from a New York City diner to the remote Greek countryside to explore the origins of fillo pies. Find out how to use fillo as a base for an array of dishes, both savory and sweet.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane celebrates the intensely flavored food and unique wines of one of Greece's most breathtaking islands, Santorini. Diane hops in a boat to pick capers on this volcanic island. She visits a renowned vineyard which still practices the island tradition of growing grapes in basket-shaped vines. Enjoy the tastes of Santorini with ingredients from field to sea.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane travels to Lesvos where the characteristic generosity of spirit almost won a few locals the Nobel Peace Prize. In Lesvos, the waters overflow with renowned sardines and shellfish, islanders count dozens of eggplant dishes as traditional fare, and ouzo, the drink of Greek hospitality, fills glasses everywhere. Discover the hospitality of the Aegean through its renowned food and drink.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: For Jacques, a rite of spring is to enjoy the salad his father made every year at this time… Spring is also when asparagus appears and he pairs it with grilled tuna. He cooks fresh peas as soon as they arrive in the market and Jacques, not wanting to waste anything, uses the pods to make a soup. He ends with his friend Ed’s Pasta Primavera…

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques suggests that mastering simple skills and techniques will make your life easier and when you’re comfortable in the kitchen, you’ll be more creative and avoid the trap of a quick fix with a frozen meal…or worse! He teaches you how to sharpen knives, cut and prepare vegetables and eggs and finally make a delicious gratin.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacues knows that most of us want to eat a healthy diet with lots of organic produce. Now so much is available at farmers markets and in grocery stores, you don’t have to spend a fortune if you chose what’s in season when it tastes the best. But for those times you’re in a hurry, it’s okay to grab prewashed, precut or frozen vegetables to make your life easier.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques shows that with a well-stocked pantry and a few good cooking techniques, you can make a tasty dish or a simple meal. His pantry essentials include potato flakes for a simple soup, spaghetti for a quick main dish, lentils, canned salmon, polenta and finally, in the freezer, a poundcake that can be transformed into a celebration dessert.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Gathering with family and friends around the table or for a game of boules is the life’s greatest pleasure for Jacques. He makes chicken wings, cucumber soup, merguez sausage, zucchini canapes, hummus and his father’s Fromage Fort. Simple food that can be made ahead means that you can enjoy a glass of wine with your company.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves seafood and feels lucky to live by Long Island Sound with its wonderful stocks of Atlantic fish and shellfish. He prepares scallops, crab and cod––raw, fried, sauteed or grilled in dishes that are quick, simple and delicious.

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Journey to Gatorland for a prehistorically wild time, tour the family home depicted in the film "A Christmas Story," and visit a one-of-a-kind museum dedicated to Muhammad Ali. Also, experience the West Virginia Penitentiary and Randyland.

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Travel to The Haskell Library and Opera House that straddles two countries, meet diver Jeffrey Bleim, and ponder African American art. Also, experience New Vrindaban, and never take fresh air for granted again at the Donora Smog Museum.

programme.desc: When the Kennedy sisters were young, they fondly remember how their friends would visit and share in their family's unique, and often exotic, dinners inspired by their family's history of world travel prior to settling down in Ireland.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy's iconic first dish is Crispy Belly Pork. In the classroom Joe Swash creates Veggie Singapore Noodles. Jeremy then makes Tea Smoked Duck and Pancakes, followed by a Macanese Egg Tart, the perfect accompaniment for a cup of tea.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Cooking over fire is one of the most ancient methods of preparing food, and in Greece, they say that one can learn how to cook, but you were born to grill. Meet one of the best Greek grill chefs who shares his secrets of cooking over fire.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: Gran Caffe Gambrinus energizes us for our stay in Naples where we first visit the tailoring masters at Rubinacci. We then learn how to make a proper Neapolitan pizza, visit Mount Vesuvius, make handmade paper, go fishing, and much more.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Mickela jumps right in with the locals for dancing, music, and the building of Castells in Girona, Catalonia during the Feast of Saint John. She also visits Palamos to learn the iconic Sardana dance and celebrate the Habaneras Festival.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Beginning in the awe-inspiring Dingle Peninsula, Mickela dances with David Geaney, goes on a walking food tour of Dingle, sits in on a trad session with SuperCeili at The Dingle Music Shop, and is then taught the brush dance in Killarney.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark return to North Fork after a hunting trip to discover Marshal Micah Torrance has been voted out. Smooth-talking newcomer Ben Judson is now in charge and his friendship with a wanted outlaw has Lucas suspicious.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Harry Chase moves to North Fork and courts Milly Scott, the owner of the general store. He impresses her with his heroic Civil War stories and claims he knew her brother who was killed in action. Lucas is suspicious and suspects he is a fraud.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas rides to a nearby town to see the gunsmith to get a new spring for his rifle. On the way, two gunmen ambush Lucas, knocking him unconscious. When Lucas awakens, he has amnesia and thinks he is one of the outlaws, George Vale, who is wanted.

programme.title: Cavalry Charge

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old flame of Lucas' comes to North Fork. After Lucas learns she is sick and her deceased husband spent all her money, he goes to help. However, all is not as it seems as she didn't come alone, and Lucas' good deed involves him in a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas arrives at Eban Muchen's ranch to deliver supplies. He finds Muchen's body and hired hand, Voleny Adams, right next to him. Adams denies he killed Muchen, but no one in town believes the ex-convict and want him to hang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Three bank robbers come to the McCain Ranch and force Lucas into helping them rob the North Fork Bank. One robber stays behind to guard Mark while the other two take Lucas to town. They threaten to kill Mark, unless Lucas cooperates with the gunmen.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles

When Mother Amadeus falls ill after traveling to Montana to open a girls' school, Mary rushes to her rescue and nurses her back to health. Mary soon discovers that the Western Frontier satisfies her free-spirited nature, and she decides to stay in Montana for good. programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: When gunslinger Hogan (Clint Eastwood) discovers a group of men attempting to rape a young nun, Sara (Shirley MacLaine), he shoots them dead and rescues the woman. The two escape to a nearby camp of Mexican revolutionaries, who have hired Hogan to help fight the invading French army. En route, Sara turns out to be surprisingly crude for a nun, drinking, smoking and using curse words. When she also proves to be handy with a gun, Hogan begins wondering if she is telling him the whole truth.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: In this Western, a drifter with no name wanders into a small town, where his gun-slinging abilities are in high demand. When the drifter rides into Lago, he is met with incredulity and disapproval by the townspeople. But once he shows his skills with a pistol, the locals realize he may be able to help them fend off a band of criminals who have been terrorizing the town. He agrees to help the townspeople, but does so with his own secret agenda.

programme.title: Joe Kidd

In response, a greedy landowner gathers a posse to capture Chama and solicits Kidd's assistance. Kidd, who has no interest in the matter, changes his mind when he discovers Chama has stolen a horse and roughed up a worker from his ranch.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man arrested during a dangerous drug deal struggles to face jail time. Tempers flare when a man makes threats against the arresting officers. Marijuana falls out of a man’s pockets during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A prisoner refuses to exit his cell prompting an elaborate extraction. A man begins singing in response to his arrest. During a severe alcohol withdrawal, an inmate repeatedly escapes his restraints.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A ladies' man smuggles women's underwear into jail. A woman arrested at a traffic accident is incredulous to discover that smoking marijuana while driving is against the law. A young man charged with a DUI tells guards he fears he may become pregnant behind bars.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A jail chaplain counsels a sad inmate. An intoxicated woman demands to talk to the Canadian Embassy.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Boisterous inmates are placed in restraints after initiating several verbal altercations. A woman struggles with substance abuse following the death of her fianc̩, and two young escorts discuss their "observing" strategy when casino hopping.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man attacks a medical officer and officers rush to intervene. After destroying a tree and unleashing pigeons, a woman is arrested. Unease is caused by a man’s menacing glare during his booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a man is sent to a holding cell after hurling racial insults. In Reno, NV A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody for battery of a police officer. In Portland, OR an intoxicated eldery man breaks into song during booking.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: After cutting her head, a woman bites and kicks deputies. To investigate potential hidden meanings, a man’s tattoos are examined. A confused man is found with illegal mushrooms at a bus stop.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is charged with possession of a controlled substance. A woman denies assaulting her husband, and two aggressive cousins threaten police and end up in isolation.
